name: VisaPaymentTransaction
description: Core structure of a Visa payment transaction across Visa Direct and other payment APIs

fields.name: systemsTraceAuditNumber
fields.description: Unique 6-digit trace number assigned by the merchant for each transaction

fields.name: retrievalReferenceNumber
fields.description: 12-digit reference number used for transaction retrieval

fields.name: localTransactionDateTime
fields.description: Transaction date and time in local merchant timezone (ISO 8601)

fields.name: acquiringBin
fields.description: Bank Identification Number of the acquiring institution

fields.name: acquirerCountryCode
fields.description: ISO 3166-1 numeric country code of the acquiring institution

fields.name: cardAcceptor
fields.description: Information about the merchant or card acceptor

fields.name: actionCode
fields.description: Response code from the issuer (00 = approved)
